name: clibridge
description: Status bar buttons to drive clibridge4unity against the running Unity Editor.

clibridge.executablePath.description: Path to the clibridge4unity executable. Defaults to looking it up on PATH.

clibridge.projectPath.description: Absolute path to the Unity project root (the folder containing Assets/ and ProjectSettings/). Leave empty to auto-detect from open workspace folders.

clibridge.versionCheck.description: Check (via the bridge's BRIDGEINFO handshake) whether this extension is compatible with the running Unity bridge. When incompatible, the Compile/Status buttons are hidden and a one-click 'update extension' warning is shown instead. Disable to always show the buttons.
